s3.storagelens.accountlevel.CfnAbout: This resource contains the details of the account-level metrics for Amazon S3 Storage Lens.

s3.storagelens.accountlevel.ActivityMetr.Description: This property contains the details of account-level activity metrics for S3 Storage Lens.

s3.storagelens.accountlevel.AdvancedCost.Description: This property contains the details of account-level advanced cost optimization metrics for S3 Storage Lens.

s3.storagelens.accountlevel.AdvancedData.Description: This property contains the details of account-level advanced data protection metrics for S3 Storage Lens.

s3.storagelens.accountlevel.BucketLevel.Description: This property contains the details of the account-level bucket-level configurations for Amazon S3 Storage Lens.

s3.storagelens.accountlevel.DetailedStat.Description: This property contains the details of account-level detailed status code metrics for S3 Storage Lens.
